resources.string: Post-quantum encrypted messenger\nNo phone number · Zero metadata
Write down these 24 words in order.\nThey allow you to restore your account.
I have written down my recovery phrase
Have this QR scanned — your username is included,\nthe contact won\'t need to type anything!
📷 Your username is only included in the QR
The copied/shared link does not contain your username
No conversations.\nAdd a contact to get started.
Fialka will alert you in real time about new encrypted messages, even when the app is closed. Notifications contain only the contact name, never the message content — full privacy protection.
You can re-enable them in the Android app settings. To receive messages faster in the background, we strongly recommend enabling notifications.

Fialka needs Tor to always be active in the background to receive P2P messages. Android battery optimizations may stop Tor unexpectedly. We strongly recommend disabling battery optimization for Fialka.
Paste the received invitation link here
You cannot add your own key.
The contact\'s username will be auto-filled from their QR
⏳ Waiting for contact acceptance.\nMessages will be available once the request is accepted.

Are you sure you want to delete your account?

This action will:
• Delete your identity and cryptographic keys
• Delete all your contacts
• Delete all your conversations
• Delete your Mailbox address and messages in transit

This action is irreversible.
This phone will be configured irreversibly.\nChoose its role carefully.
Full encrypted messaging.\nSend and receive messages via Tor.\nThis mode is for everyday use.
Dedicated storage server.\nStores encrypted messages for your contacts.\nThis phone will NOT be able to send messages.
⚠ This choice is irreversible. Only a reinstall will allow you to change.
Choose the access type for your mailbox.
Private mailbox — only the first member (OWNER) can join.\nNo invitation required.
Invitation-only access.\nThe OWNER can invite other members via single-use codes.
Connecting to Tor and publishing .onion address
Scan this QR from your main phone to register as OWNER.
⚠ This QR will only be displayed once.\nOnce validated, only the OWNER can administer this mailbox.

This will delete ALL mailbox data (messages, members, invitations).

This action is irreversible.

Do you want to continue?
You are not connected to any mailbox.\nScan the QR code displayed on the server phone to connect.
Do you want to leave this mailbox and clear the local connection?
Invalid QR code — this is not a mailbox QR
%1$s will be removed from the mailbox.
Generates random Tor traffic to mask your real activity
Duration of ephemeral messages at creation
Delay before automatically locking the application
Are you sure you want to disable the PIN code?
A cleaner, denser, more readable interface across all 5 themes.
Try a different term or category.
The theme changes colors without breaking Fialka\'s visual landmarks.
Immediate preview, without breaking global consistency.
Phantom remains the Fialka visual reference.
Fialka\'s visual DNA, recommended by default.
Clean, sharp and readable light version.
Local username, strong identity, post-quantum encryption. Nothing superfluous.
Confirm three words from your phrase.
Correctly enter the three requested words to verify that your recovery phrase has been properly noted.
Fill in the three requested words.
At least one word is incorrect. Check your seed and try again.
Privacy, terms of use and security.
GPLv3 framework and integrated third-party components.
Make an anonymous donation in Monero.
Normal mode active. Client access to mailbox.
Mailbox mode active. Server management and member access.
Generates random Tor traffic to mask your activity.
Read and accept to use Fialka.
⚠️ Fialka is a tool. Developers operate no infrastructure, store no user data and cannot access any messages. All communication is peer-to-peer via Tor. You alone are responsible for your use.
You must be at least 16 years old (or the minimum legal age of digital consent in your country). By using Fialka, you confirm that you meet this condition.

You are solely and entirely responsible for any use you make of Fialka. The developers disclaim any liability for any use, whether lawful or unlawful. By using Fialka, you acknowledge having read these terms and accept full personal responsibility for all consequences of your use.

Fialka is provided "AS IS", without warranty of any kind. The cryptographic implementation has not yet been audited by a third-party firm. The developers do not guarantee the absence of vulnerabilities.

This software contains cryptographic elements subject to export regulations (Wassenaar, ECCN 5D002.C.1 — US BIS, EU Regulation 2021/821). As GPLv3 open source software, it is exempt in France and the EU. Verify the laws of your country. Backup files (.fialka) containing cryptographic material are subject to the same rules.

Fialka includes a local, non-custodial Monero wallet. Your private keys remain exclusively on your device — developers have no access, no visibility of your funds.

Fialka charges NO fees, NO percentage on transactions. The only fees are Monero network fees (paid to miners), the amount of which is shown to you before confirmation.

• France: The PSAN regime (AMF / PACTE Act 2019-486) does not apply to self-hosted wallets. You are responsible for declaring capital gains (PFU 30%, Art. 150 VH bis CGI).

• EU: MiCA (2023/1114) explicitly excludes non-custodial wallets. The Travel Rule (2023/1113) only applies to CASPs.

• USA: FinCEN FIN-2019-G001 — non-custodial wallet is not an MSB. You are responsible for compliance with OFAC sanctions and IRS reporting (Notice 2014-21, Form 8949).

Verify the laws of your jurisdiction. Fialka provides no legal or tax advice.

Fialka supports encrypted backup files (.fialka). These files contain your identity keys, your contacts and optionally your wallet seed — but NOT your messages (privacy by design). AES-256-GCM encryption with key derived via PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 (600,000 iterations). The passphrase is known only to you — developers cannot recover a backup whose password you have lost.
You must be 16 or older to use this application.
If you do not verify your recovery phrase now, you may not be able to restore your account if you lose your device.\n\nAre you certain you have saved your 24 words in a safe place?
The clipboard is accessible by other applications. The phrase will be automatically cleared after 90 seconds, but avoid copy-pasting into an unsecured app.\n\nProceed anyway?
Phrase copied — automatic clearing in 90 seconds.
Send and receive Monero directly in Fialka, via Tor.
This wallet is non-custodial: you alone control your funds. Write down your 25 recovery words — if you lose them, your XMR are unrecoverable.
These 25 words are your XMR wallet. Write them down in order on paper, offline.
Never share these words with anyone. Fialka cannot recover them if you lose them.
I have written down my 25 words in a safe place.
Words copied — automatic clearing in 60 seconds
Have you written down your 25 words? If you lose them, your XMR will be unrecoverable.
Enter your 25 Monero words in order. Restoring from a precise block height is much faster.
If you know the creation date of your wallet, enter the corresponding block number to speed up synchronization. Otherwise, leave empty (scan from the beginning).
A unique address will be generated for this contact.
Share this address to receive XMR.
Optional — enter an LWS server URL for lightweight synchronization.
Node used to send transactions. Traffic goes through Tor.
This action removes your wallet key from the device. Your XMR remain recoverable with your 25 seed words.
Are you sure? This action removes your seed from the device. Your XMR are recoverable only with your 25 words.

Send %1$s XMR to

%2$s

Estimated network fee: ~0.0001 XMR (to Monero miners, zero taken by Fialka)

This action is irreversible.
Each donation receives a unique XMR address — your contribution is publicly verifiable, without linking your identity.
Enable XMR wallet and configure the stagenet node.
Enable or disable the wallet feature, then configure the node.
The Wallet button will appear at the top of Conversations.
⚠ STAGENET — Test network. Stagenet XMR have no real value.
Delete your current wallet to change network.

To switch to %1$s, your current wallet must be deleted.

Stagenet and mainnet seeds are distinct and incompatible — you will need to create or restore a new wallet on the target network.

⚠ Make sure you have saved your seed (25 words) before continuing.
This wallet will be created on the %1$s network. Stagenet and mainnet seeds are distinct and incompatible.
This action is irreversible. Your XMR will be unrecoverable without your recovery phrase (25 words). Have you properly saved your seed?
Create a new wallet or restore a Monero 25-word seed.
Paste your Monero seed here (25 words)
A wallet already exists on this device.
Wallet active, seed present on device.
The seed is stored separately and can be revealed on request.
These 25 words allow you to restore this wallet. Never share them.
Save a local send before plugging in the transaction engine.
Monero address too short or invalid.
Receive address linked to your wallet seed.
Write down these 25 words in order. It\'s the only way to recover your XMR.
I have saved my wallet seed in a safe place
Create, restore or prepare a draft to see activity appear here.
Create a new wallet or restore a 25-word Monero seed.
Send your receive address to the contact
Create a request with optional amount
Send XMR directly from the wallet
Select the language you want to use.\nYou can change it later in Settings.
The phrase must contain exactly 24 words
PIN removed. You can set a new one in Settings.
The phrase does not match this account
Scan the QR or paste the invitation link.
The icon change takes effect when you leave the app. The launcher name will change too.
The app opens as a real calculator. Enter your secret code to access Fialka.
The backup is encrypted with your passphrase. It contains only what you select below. Keep it in a safe place.
Choose a strong passphrase. It will be required to restore the backup. If you lose it, the backup cannot be recovered.
Choose a .fialka file and enter the passphrase used when creating it. Data will be restored to this device.
⚠ Restoring will replace your current identity and data.
PQXDH · X25519 + ML-KEM-1024 · AES-256-GCM · Double Ratchet
Create or restore your Fialka wallet to send an XMR donation.
No donation sent from this app
Verify that the emojis below are identical on both phones to confirm the conversation is secure.

Two methods:

🔢 Emojis — Compare the emojis visually in person or by video call.

📷 QR Code — Scan the QR code shown on your contact's phone. Verification is automatic.

If fingerprints don't match, the conversation may be compromised (MITM attack).
Deleting your account will erase all your conversations, keys and local data. This action is irreversible.
⚠ Restoring will replace your current identity and data.
✅ Enabled — use your fingerprint or face
This device has no biometric sensor
No fingerprint/face registered in phone settings
✅ Active — traffic masked in real time
Show this QR code to your contact to scan, or scan theirs.
Verify that the emojis below are identical on both phones to confirm the conversation is secure.
Fingerprints match! The conversation is authentic and secure.
WARNING: fingerprints do not match!\n\nThis may indicate a man-in-the-middle (MITM) attack. Do not share sensitive information in this conversation.
New messages sent in conversations with ephemeral messages enabled will be automatically deleted after the chosen duration.

This setting applies by default to new conversations.

You can also change the duration individually in each conversation via the contact profile.

Only new messages are affected. Existing messages are not impacted.
✅ Enabled — you will receive notifications for new messages
✅ Battery optimizations disabled — Tor stays active in background
⚠️ Battery optimizations may kill Tor in background — tap to fix
You cannot add your own key.
This contact already exists under the name « %1$s ».
Release to send • Slide to cancel
This contact deleted their account. This conversation no longer exists on the server.
This will delete temporary files (thumbnails, render data). No messages will be deleted.
%1$d message(s) containing files will be deleted. This action is irreversible.
This will permanently delete the history of ALL conversations.\n\nYour contacts will not be deleted. This action is irreversible.
Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
Incorrect passphrase. Check and try again.
Keep these words in a safe place. Never share them.
Invalid phrase. Check the words and try again.
Incorrect passphrase. Check and try again.
Are you sure you want to leave « %1$s »?
All messages will be permanently deleted from this device.
Enter your 24 words separated by spaces
Enter your recovery phrase (24 words) to reset your PIN.
Unlock with your fingerprint or face
🔐 Your contact verified the security fingerprint
🔄 This contact restored their account. Send a message to start a new encrypted session.
Wallet unavailable — enable it in settings
Request timed out. Check your internet connection.
File too short to be a Fialka backup.
Identity not configured — set up your account first
Keep these words safe. Never share them.
Unable to generate donation address. Make sure your Fialka identity is configured.

You are about to send

%1$s

Fee priority: %2$s

Address:
%3$s…
Donation sent! Thank you for your support ❤️

This Fialka update requires a local database reset.

⚠ All your messages, contacts and sessions will be erased from this device.

Your identity keys (seed phrase) are NOT affected — you can recreate your account.

If you want to keep your data, do not continue and export your backup first.
Prevents Tor from stopping in the background

Notifications use UnifiedPush (ntfy.sh or self-hosted).

• No message content is sent
• Only a wake signal is transmitted
• Zero Google — no FCM, no Google token
• Your privacy is always protected
Messages are deleted from the server upon receipt
Configurable per conversation from the contact profile

• E2E encryption (X25519 + AES-256-GCM)
• Double Ratchet with Perfect Forward Secrecy
• Message padding (uniform size)
• HMAC on sender identifier
• Server message deletion after receipt
• Optional fake traffic against traffic analysis

The PIN is stored as a PBKDF2 hash (600k iterations) in an encrypted space (Keystore).

Even with root access, the PIN cannot be recovered in plain text.

The app re-locks automatically after the chosen delay.
Ephemeral messages whose timer has elapsed
Clears the history of all conversations

Fialka uses Tor for all its communications. Tor routes your traffic through multiple encrypted relays, hiding your IP address.

Your account's .onion service is accessible only via Tor — no one can reach it directly from the public internet.

The active circuits above represent the paths used for your communications.
No groups\nCreate or join a group
Seed must contain exactly 25 words (%1$d detected)
Invalid seed — check the 25 words and checksum
Clock out of sync (%1$s min) — check your device date/time
Invalid signature — identity corrupted or incompatible
Sending XMR…\nThis may take a few seconds.
